tagline: Quantify every trade with probability math

steps.description: Current price field populates with a realistic asset price, setting the baseline for calculations
Position size updates, scaling the expected value output proportionally
Take-profit target field fills in, activating the first price scenario row
Stop-loss price fills in, completing the risk/reward scenario setup
Expected value result appears instantly — showing positive EV, win rate, and risk-reward ratio in a results panel
